title: OpenAI outlines teen protections and learning controls in ChatGPT
friendlyTitle: OpenAI explains safety and study tools for teenagers
summary: OpenAI has detailed its approach to teen use of ChatGPT, including age prediction, parental controls, age-tailored guardrails and learning-focused features. Parents with linked teen accounts can now enable Study Mode by default for new chats, while OpenAI says it is continuing to expand safeguards and family tools.
friendlySummary: OpenAI says ChatGPT has extra protections for teenagers, including parent controls and Study Mode. Study Mode is designed to guide learning instead of only giving answers.
whyItMatters: As AI becomes a normal study companion, practical controls matter more than abstract policy statements. Families and schools need tools that encourage explanation and checking rather than simply outsourcing homework, alongside clear limits for sensitive situations.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI can help young people learn when it asks useful questions and explains ideas. Parents and schools still need clear settings and good guidance.
